Welcome to MAVERIC Informatics’s documentation!¶

This guide is a work in progress! It is being built, week-by-week, as OSU’s microbiome informatics course (M8194) is being taught during the Fall of 2019. The goal is to provide a centralized resource for all things microbial and viral using OSC’s (among others) resources. The guides presented here build upon lectures of 8194, and hopefully provide enough information to support class projects and research overall.

Contents:

  • Introduction and Overview
  • Microbial Informatics
  • OSC Introduction and Guide
    • Systems
    • Login Nodes
    • Filesystems
    • Connecting to OSC
    • Transferring Data to/from OSC
    • Batch Processing (i.e. submitting jobs)
    • Modules
    • Links
  • QIIME2
    • Data Import
    • Demultiplexing
    • Summarize
    • Quality Control and Creating the Feature Table
    • Alpha and Beta Diversity Analyses
  • UNIX/LINUX Introduction and Guide
  • Modules and Tools on OSC!
    • Running Tools Directly
    • Using Modules
    • Singularity containers
  • Building Modules and Tools on OSC
